title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
